## Summary

Describe the mathematical or formalization change and its effect on public theorem statements.

## Verification

- [ ] `lake build CofiniteDerivatives`
- [ ] `lake env lean Audit.lean`
- [ ] `tectonic paper.tex` when manuscript sources change
- [ ] No `sorry`, `admit`, or custom axioms were introduced

## Correspondence

Explain how manuscript changes and Lean changes remain aligned, or state why only one side changes.
